assertions.expectation: Recommends increasing maxSurge significantly (e.g., 10-20 or higher) to parallelize node replacements
assertions.reason: Response recommends maxSurge values of 20 for stateless pools, 5 for database pools, and 3 for GPU pools, clearly explaining parallelization benefits

assertions.expectation: Explains that higher maxSurge means more nodes upgrading simultaneously but requires more compute quota
assertions.reason: Response explicitly explains that higher surge means more nodes in parallel and includes quota verification section with specific commands and mentions needing quota for ~100+ additional nodes

assertions.expectation: Advises checking and requesting increased compute quota before the upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed quota checking commands using gcloud compute regions describe and specifically mentions verifying compute quota vs surge needs

assertions.expectation: Suggests staggering node pool upgrades or running non-conflicting pools in parallel
assertions.reason: Response provides explicit parallel pool upgrade strategy with commands to start all pools simultaneously using background processes (&)

assertions.expectation: Mentions that maxUnavailable can be set >0 for non-critical pools to speed things up further
assertions.reason: Response consistently shows maxUnavailable=0 for all pool examples and does not mention setting it >0 for non-critical pools as a speed optimization

assertions.expectation: Recommends expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends
assertions.reason: Response focuses on optimizing within the existing 8-hour window and does not suggest expanding the maintenance window or splitting across multiple weekends as alternatives

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for updating surge settings on each pool
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud container node-pools update commands with max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade parameters for different pool types

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to track upgrade progress in real-time
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive monitoring section with watch commands for node status, operations tracking, and pod scheduling events
